languages.text: "Кто может быть лучшим губернатор-полковником, чем капитан-интендант?"
"Who could make for a better colonel-governor than the captain-quartermaster?"
languages.original_text: "Кто может быть лучшим губернатор-полковником, чем капитан-интендант?"

traits.locale_text: "Who would make for a better Colonel-Governor than the captain-quartermaster?"
"Who could make for a better colonel-governor than the captain-quartermaster?"
"Who would make for a better Castellan-Governor than the captain-quartermaster?"
"Who would make for a better Colonel-Governor than the captain-quartermaster?"
"Who could make for a better colonel-governor than the captain-quartermaster?"

languages.text: 「船長兼軍需長よりも優れた城代総督になれる者が他にいるか？」
languages.original_text: "Who would make for a better Castellan-Governor than the captain-quartermaster?"

traits.locale_text: 「船長兼軍需長よりも優れた城代総督になれる者が他にいるか？」

languages.text: « Je ne vois pas de meilleure candidate au poste de colonel-gouverneure que la capitaine-quartier-maître. »
languages.original_text: "Who could make for a better colonel-governor than the captain-quartermaster?"

traits.locale_text: « Je ne vois pas de meilleure candidate au poste de colonel-gouverneure que la capitaine-quartier-maître. »

languages.text: "Levazımcı Yüzbaşı'dan daha iyi bir Vali Albay olabilir mi?"
languages.original_text: "Who could make for a better colonel-governor than the captain-quartermaster?"

traits.locale_text: "Levazımcı Yüzbaşı'dan daha iyi bir Vali Albay olabilir mi?"

languages.text: "Wer wäre eine bessere Colonel-Gouverneurin als die Captain-Quartiermeisterin?"
languages.original_text: "Who could make for a better colonel-governor than the captain-quartermaster?"

traits.locale_text: "Wer wäre eine bessere Colonel-Gouverneurin als die Captain-Quartiermeisterin?"

languages.text: «¿Quién desempeñaría mejor las funciones de coronel-gobernadora que la capitana intendente?».
languages.original_text: "Who could make for a better colonel-governor than the captain-quartermaster?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Quién desempeñaría mejor las funciones de coronel-gobernadora que la capitana intendente?».

languages.text: “还有谁能比我们的军需官上尉更适合担任总督上校一职呢？”
languages.original_text: "Who could make for a better colonel-governor than the captain-quartermaster?"

traits.locale_text: “还有谁能比我们的军需官上尉更适合担任总督上校一职呢？”
